comments.name: Jeff Cann
comments.comment: I suppose stats are available to say if blogging is on the rise or the wan. My perspective is very wordpress focused, and here, writing in general and especially quality writing is fading away. Even the ridiculous daily prompts inspire short and literal responses without any apparent craft. And with the exception of the Christmas Letter which has been around for decades, blogging is still a “new” media in history even if it’s somewhat dated in terms of a post web society. Thanks for reading and commenting.
